description: 3-2 small-roll threshold: hp=45 (just above mustStabilize strict threshold), level=6, gold=36, weak board. mustStabilize is true because weakBoard (board strength 1.25 << expected 22.8). Roll base count=2 (hp 42-50 bracket), rollBudget=(36-30)/2=3, so actual count=min(2,3)=2. Tests that the engine chooses a small targeted roll rather than going all-in when HP is borderline.
